content: Medallion architecture: Bronze=raw landing zone mirroring source systems with metadata (load timestamps, process IDs), immutable historical archive. Silver=cleansed/conformed enterprise view, matched/merged/deduplicated with just-enough transforms, normalized models. Gold=curated business-level, denormalized read-optimized star schemas. Data flows progressively: Sources->Bronze->Silver->Gold. Principles: reproducibility from raw, incremental ETL, ACID transactions, separation of concerns. Silver serves multiple Gold consumers.
